rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendants Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Lodge Controversial Funds With Court
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 30, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP, LLC, ANNE SWAIN Notice Of Defendants Motion For Preliminary Injunction To Lodge Controversial Funds With Court DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a Preliminary Injunction is available to the defendant under the circumstances of this case. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION VS. ROBERT KINANN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For The Re-Consideration Of The Order Denying The Motion To Vacate The Default And Default Judgment, The Memorandum Of P&A, And The Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 30, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT ROBERT KINANN Ntc Of Motion For The Re-Consideration Of The Order Denying The Motion To Vacate The Default And Default Judgment DENIED. Defendant fails to carry his burden for a motion for reconsideration. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN F. LEE VS. DANIEL EVERETT ET AL

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Discovery Answer, And For Monetary Sanction, Supporting Declaration Of John F.
